issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT RENTED A 2015 NISSAN MAXIMA. WHILE DRIVING 10 MPH, THE VEHICLE UNINTENDEDLY ACCELERATED TO 75 MPH WHILE DEPARTING FROM A CAR WASH. THE VEHICLE CRASHED INTO TWO VEHICLES AND A WALL. THE FRONT PASSENGER AND DRIVER SIDE AIR BAGS FAILED TO DEPLOY. THE CONTACT SUFFERED

narrative.headline: What 2015 Nissan Maxima owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (100% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
